summary: Iteration 89: Tested 4 new features - AI Eligibility Pre-Score (#1), Document Expiry Tracker (#2), WhatsApp Smart Share (#3), Visa Pathway Comparison (#8). All backend APIs pass (18/18 tests). All frontend features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 verified 4 new features: (1) AI Eligibility Pre-Score at /eligibility - public page with form, AI scoring via Claude Sonnet 4.6, 8 pathway cards with scores/tiers/strengths/gaps, share button, lead capture with consent. (2) Document Expiry Tracker - DocExpiryWidget on AdminHome with 4 stat cells (Expired/Critical/Warning/Heads-up), Refresh and Send Alerts buttons, idempotent alert firing. (3) WhatsApp Smart Share - green-bordered WhatsApp button in PaActionBar between Copy Public Link and Preview as Client, opens wa.me deep link. (4) Visa Pathway Comparison at /visa-compare - 8 pickable pathway pills, side-by-side comparison cards with timeline/cost/education/work-exp/benefits/drawbacks/post-arrival-jobs. Login page has 2 new public access tiles linking to /eligibility and /visa-compare.

AI_Eligibility_PreScore.POST /api/eligibility/score: PASS - Returns scored pathways with score/tier/timeline/strengths/gaps/notes + top_recommendation + overall_summary
AI_Eligibility_PreScore.GET /api/eligibility/share/{score_id}: PASS - Public access to shared scores
AI_Eligibility_PreScore.Frontend /eligibility form: PASS - All data-testids present (elig-name, elig-email, elig-mobile, elig-age, elig-education, elig-experience, elig-occupation, elig-english, elig-savings, elig-country-canada, elig-job-offer, elig-consent, elig-submit)
AI_Eligibility_PreScore.Frontend /eligibility results: PASS - 8 pathway cards, top recommendation banner, share button, compare button

Visa_Pathway_Comparison.GET /api/visa-compare/pathways: PASS - Returns 8 seeded pathways with all fields
Visa_Pathway_Comparison.GET /api/visa-compare/compare: PASS - Returns pathways in correct order
Visa_Pathway_Comparison.Frontend /visa-compare: PASS - 8 pickable pathway pills, side-by-side comparison cards with all required fields

Document_Expiry_Tracker.PUT /api/doc-expiry/pa-doc/{doc_id}/expi: SKIPPED - No PA documents with expiry to test
Document_Expiry_Tracker.Frontend DocExpiryWidget on AdminHome: PASS - Widget visible with 4 stat cells, Refresh and Send Alerts buttons

WhatsApp_Smart_Share.Button position: PASS - Between Copy Public Link and Preview as Client
WhatsApp_Smart_Share.Existing buttons preserved: PASS - copy-link, preview-client, action-{stage} all present
